name: Kasih Pastel
signature: Soft watercolor-blob shapes that drift gently behind every section, like Korean pre-wedding studio photography pages. Couple photos sit in organic blob-shaped frames rather than a circle or square.
brief: Soft Korean-pastel aesthetic — blush and lavender, rounded shapes, dreamy and youthful rather than ceremonial. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
